allowForwardedTraffic=true
useRemoteGateways=false" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="-0.2" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="peer-tst-uat-miss" edge="1" parent="mainsub" source="tstvnet" style="endArrow=none;html=1;strokeColor=#ff0000;strokeWidth=2;dashed=1;" target="uatvnet"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="peer-tst-uat-miss-lbl" connectable="0" parent="peer-tst-uat-miss" style="edgeLabel;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;resizable=0;points=[];fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#ff0000;fillColor=#ffffff;" value="❌ 無直接 Peering" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="-0.1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="peer-tst-hub" edge="1" parent="1" source="tstvnet" style="endArrow=classic;startArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#b85450;strokeWidth=3;" target="hubvnet"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="peer-tst-hub-lbl" connectable="0" parent="peer-tst-hub" style="edgeLabel;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;resizable=0;points=[];fontSize=10;fillColor=#ffffff;" value="Peering ✓
useRemoteGateways=true
(走 Hub Gateway 出外)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="-0.2" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="peer-uat-hub" edge="1" parent="1" source="uatvnet" style="endArrow=classic;startArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#b85450;strokeWidth=3;" target="hubvnet"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="peer-uat-hub-lbl" connectable="0" parent="peer-uat-hub" style="edgeLabel;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;resizable=0;points=[];fontSize=10;fillColor=#ffffff;" value="Peering ✓
useRemoteGateways=true
(走 Hub Gateway 出外)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="-0.2" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="peer-aks-hub-miss" edge="1" parent="1" source="aksvnet" style="endArrow=none;html=1;strokeColor=#ff0000;strokeWidth=2;dashed=1;" target="hubvnet"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="peer-aks-hub-miss-lbl" connectable="0" parent="peer-aks-hub-miss" style="edgeLabel;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;resizable=0;points=[];fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#ff0000;fillColor=#ffffff;" value="❌ 無直接 Peering
(AKS 無法直走 Hub Gateway)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="-0.2" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="legend" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;verticalAlign=top;fontSize=10;align=left;" value="圖例
━━ 綠色粗線：Spoke ↔ Spoke Peering（本訂閱內，allowForwardedTraffic=true）
━━ 紅色粗線：Spoke ↔ Hub Peering（跨訂閱，useRemoteGateways=true）
┅┅ 紅色虛線 ❌：實際不存在的 Peering（事實核對標註）

VNet 容器色碼
■ 紅：Hub VNet（另一訂閱） ■ 藍：tst Spoke ■ 綠：uat Spoke ■ 橘：AKS VNet
灰色虛線外框：Azure 訂閱邊界" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="260" width="520" x="40" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.div:
圖例
━━ 綠色粗線：Spoke ↔ Spoke Peering（本訂閱內，allowForwardedTraffic=true）
━━ 紅色粗線：Spoke ↔ Hub Peering（跨訂閱，useRemoteGateways=true）
┅┅ 紅色虛線 ❌：實際不存在的 Peering（事實核對標註）
VNet 容器色碼
■ 紅：Hub VNet（另一訂閱） ■ 藍：tst Spoke ■ 綠：uat Spoke ■ 橘：AKS VNet
灰色虛線外框：Azure 訂閱邊界
